div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2D3047;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2D3047, #c0c2d6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 246px; height: 1px; padding-top: 73px; margin-left: 8px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Users
PK user_id : INTEGERfull_name : VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
email : VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE
role : VARCHAR(20) CHECK (Ticket Manager / Football Fan)
phone_number : VARCHAR(20) NULL

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 266px; height: 1px; padding-top: 73px; margin-left: 568px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Matches
PK match_id : INTEGERfixture : VARCHAR(150)
tournament_category : VARCHAR(50)
base_ticket_price : NUMERIC(10,2) ≥ 0
match_status : VARCHAR(20) CHECK (Available / Selling Fast / Sold Out / Postponed)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div:
Bookings
PK booking_id : INTEGERFK user_id : INTEGER (→ Users.user_id)
FK match_id : INTEGER (→ Matches.match_id)
seat_number : VARCHAR(10) NULL
payment_status : VARCHAR(20) NULL CHECK (Pending / Confirmed / Cancelled / Refunded)
total_cost : NUMERIC(10,2) ≥ 0
